---
title: "Établi Vitrine"
sidebar: en
---

<img src="../_icons/icon-vitrine.svg" alt="" width="80" align="right" style="margin:0 0 1rem 1rem;">

<span class="etabli-badge">Flagship runtime</span>

> Run interactive Shiny apps fully on-device.

Établi Vitrine bundles WebR and shinylive-R and runs interactive Shiny applications fully locally — without a server, without a network. Apps can be imported from the library, the file system, the system share sheet, or a URL. Statistical power analysis is delivered as a bundled Shiny app inside Vitrine; there is no separate power-analysis app anymore.

![Vitrine — library on Android](../_screens/android-library.png){width=320}

## Who benefits

Authors of Shiny apps who want to demo without standing up a server — at conferences, in classrooms, to colleagues without an R install. And anyone who needs statistical tools (e.g. power calculations) mobile and offline.

## Platforms

| Platform | Status |
|----------|--------|
| iOS      | ✓      |
| Android  | ✓      |
| macOS    | ✓      |
| Linux    | ✓      |
| Windows  | ✓      |

## Privacy

No analytics, no third-party SDKs. The app runs fully offline; imported Shiny apps run inside a locally hosted WebAssembly sandbox. Nothing leaves the device.

## Installation

Établi Vitrine is **under active development**. There are no App Store, Google Play or F-Droid releases yet.

| Channel | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Android (APK) | **Development build** via [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-vitrine/releases) |
| App Store (iOS) | planned — not yet available |
| Google Play | planned — not yet available |
| F-Droid | planned — not yet available |
| Desktop (macOS, Windows, Linux) | build from source |

Details: see [Getting Started](getting-started.qmd).

## Support

If you find the app useful: [Liberapay](https://liberapay.com/rabanheller/) · inside the app you will also find a Buy-Me-a-Coffee link.
